nasb.text: Wisdom is in the presence of the one who has understanding, But the eyes of a fool are on the ends of the earth.

esv.text: The discerning sets his face toward wisdom, but the eyes of a fool are on the ends of the earth.

cnv.text: 聰明人面前有智慧， 愚昧人卻眼望地極。

ccb.text: 哲士追求智慧， 愚人漫无目标。

csbs.text: 智慧就在有悟性的人面前； 愚昧人的眼却望着地极。
